title: Benedict’s Newsletter — Benedict Evans
text:
Benedict’s Newsletter
What happened in tech that mattered, and what did it mean? Once a week, I send an email newsletter to close to 200,000 people – I pick out the changes and ideas you don’t want to miss in all the
noise, and give them context and analysis.
Choose your subscription
Premium
Premium edition
What happened, what did you miss, and why did it matter? Every Sunday evening, Premium subscribers get analysis of the key stories and ideas in tech that week, together with an exclusive column. Premium subscribers also have access to the complete archive of over 600 issues.
A subscription is $150 for a year.
Free
What people say
Om Malik
Journalist, entrepreneur, and venture capitalist
A good way to catch up on all the relevant technology news with context, without the unnecessary throat clearing.
Steven Sinofsky
Former head of Microsoft Windows, partner at Andreessen Horowitz
Here’s the latest must-subscribe independent newsletter. My $0.02 is that Benedict brings a unique global and historical context to trends and shifts in technology and companies. He’s much less about next-day-takes and more about the long term.
Bruce Sterling
Author, journalist, editor, critic
I really appreciate this guy's efforts. Maybe more so when I believe him less.
Sponsorship
Your brand here?
This newsletter reaches close to 200,000 people each week, heavily concentrated in tech, media and finance, with a 50% open rate. Get in touch if you'd like to discuss sponsorship options.
Notes
Access the premium archive.
You can manage a Premium account here. An account covers one person. It’s fine to forward things occasionally, but not to share accounts or send this to your whole company every week. For group plans or anything else, please get in touch.
You can read the privacy policy.
